title: Public CLI completion with unit tests but no representative execution is flagged
text: 完了要約: JSON output schema を返す CLI command を実装した。完了条件: CLI が JSON を返す。公開挙動: CLI command と JSON output schema が利用者に見える。残リスク: なし。
evidence: 受入証拠: pytest passed。要求との対応: unit tests で schema field を確認。
rationale: Unit tests are verification evidence, but public CLI behavior also needs representative execution or an explicit not-run reason.
